text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's nearly time for training, but Fuji Kiseki is out
doing some last-minute shopping.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Okay! The only thing left is—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Um... You're Fuji Kiseki, right? I'm a big fan! I've
been following all your races!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thank you so much! I'm honored.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe how lucky I am to have caught the
attention of such a cute pony such as yourself.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
My family and friends all love you too! Could I
get an autograph, please?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But of course. I'll gladly sign as many as you'd like
for as long as I still have command over my arm.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! You're so cool! U-um, could I have a
hundred autographs, then?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh, I knew I was being too greedy... Sniffle.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, it's all right! I can do a hundred!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
This is an awkward place to wait, so why don't we
have some tea at a cafe while I sign your
autographs?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Fuji Kiseki ends up completely neglecting
her training...
